form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 9th (Fr7) over 1609m at Hoosier Park, beaten 12 m by Surf Scoter (1:58.20) in CLCDNW4 on March 26 at $11.20. form.formComment: Resuming after three-and-a-half months off the scene. Finished off last campaign when beaten by 3 m finishing fifth behind Memento Mori at this track over 1609m in a NW4PMCD on December 23 at $5.70. Plenty to like about his prospects.
